item.title: CLI entry point + UX helpers
item.intent: Ship the CLI entry point so every command is reachable, errors are human-readable, and first-run detects missing prerequisites. Nothing runs without this.
item.description: HIGH VALUE: Gate item — nothing runs without this. Commander.js flat CLI (AD-01), first-run detection, spinner/error UX helpers. Acceptance: clawhq --help lists all commands; error handler formats cleanly; first-run detects missing install.
steps: Set up Commander.js flat CLI with all command registrations
Implement error handler with formatted terminal output
Add first-run detection for missing prerequisites
Build spinner and formatError UX helpers
acceptanceCriteria: Error handler formats errors cleanly for terminal display
First-run detects missing install and guides user to 'clawhq install'
